appStore.title: Coloring Farm Tap to Color Fun
appStore.description:
Discover cows, pigs, ducks, chickens and all your favorite barnyard buddies as you fill the farm with color! Pages come to life and as each scene unfolds, new interactive characters and items appear!

An intuitive user interface ensures that even the youngest players can have fun too! Helpful hints show you where to touch next and each page tells its own unique story!

• Pick apples and hatch eggs! 
• Lots of fun farm chores! 
• Discover hidden items to color 
• Cows, ducks, pigs and more!
• Cute hints help younger players!
• No ads! No menus!
• Created by parents and teachers! 

#1 Kids and Family App for iPad and iPhone on iTunes! Showcased in iPad Apps For Kids For Dummies! Featured on The iPhone Mom, Moms With Apps, Famigo, Fun 2 Tap, App Advice and in over 156 App Stores!

"Provides a sense of accomplishment with its simple touch-to-create-color play pattern." - Jinny Gudmundsen, Kid Tech Columnist, USA Today.com

"Offers super-simple controls, rewards exploration and can be used as a tool for basic literacy and numeracy play" - fun2tap.com

"Good for road trips, great for tablets and musical!" - Famigo

"My boys love this app. It is so easy and fun to use. They love all the animals that pop up while they are coloring, Thanks for making another great app!" -User Review 

"Touch To Color Farm is a great coloring book app. The game is very interactive; everything you touch turns into color and teaches user association through interactivity. 5 stars" -Famigo 

“As parents and teachers, we believe in friction-free learning for kids of all ages. We strive to build fun experiences with eye-popping visuals, professional narration, catchy music, and lots of positive encouragement.

Thank you for supporting us and making our vision come to life.

Have fun!!”

- Blake, Mike & Amanda, Eggroll Games
